ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE RENEWED MOTION OF CROSS-DEFENDANT ISSA FUAD DUGHMAN TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT OF SEPTEMBER 1, 2006 IS DENIED. THE FOLLOWING UNDISPUTED FACTS CONFIRM THAT DUGHMAN'S PLACE OF RESIDENCE WAS 172 EDGEMONT, DALY CITY WHEN HE WAS SERVED WITH THE COMPLAINT, EITHER PERSONALLY OR BY LEAVING THE COMPLAINT WITH DUGHMAN'S FATHER: THE POLICE REPORT, THE INTERROGATORY ANSWERS IN THE RELATED CASE AND MR.
